records.summary: The page provides a physical address, email, freephone and mobile number, plus a small click-to-call image button and a contact enquiry form. Core emergency signals like response time, 24/7 statement, service area map, live chat, or WhatsApp are entirely absent.
records.topOpportunity: Full emergency landing page redesign: prominent 24/7 badge, response time guarantee, interactive service area map, WhatsApp/text CTA, and removal of the form as the fallback contact method.
records.notes: The click-to-call button exists but is a small GIF image with no size or urgency hierarchy; the absence of 24/7 info, response time, and a service map makes this a weak emergency page and a solid mid-tier prospect for a conversion-focused redesign.
